title: 21st Recon Group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''21st Recon Group''' was a [[Fighter wing/Legends|wing]] of [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|Recon-X]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] attached to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]]. The 21st Recon Group was commanded by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Rone Taggar]], and formed shortly before the [[Battle of Doornik-319]], although Rone Taggar had served with some of the [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the 21st before the conception of the unit.

==History==
These Recon-Xs were dispatched shortly after the [[Battle of Doornik-319]] to scout out the [[Yevetha]]n worlds for the assessment of the [[Yevetha]]n fleet, known as the [[Black Fleet]]. They jumped from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to their target worlds, but no Recon-X completed more than three-quarters of its scan before being destroyed or captured by the Yevetha.

Rone Taggar piloted the Recon-X ''[[Jennie Lee]]'', which was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
